title: koellia aristata
intro: Koellia aristata, also known as Aristata, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to Madagascar and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Koellia aristata is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by combining the plant's dried leaves and stems with other medicinal herbs.
